summary: Comprehensive testing of RecommendationFollowThroughSection analytics feature completed. All 12 core tests passed - section renders correctly when user has 2+ followed recommendations, displays key metrics (follow rate, alignment rate, most followed direction), shows SVG distribution chart, pattern analysis, Hebrew insights, RTL layout, and properly hides when fewer than 2 followed recommendations exist.

issues: Console error: <polyline> attribute points expected number - affects DecisionMap.js, QuarterlyReviewSection.js, CollectiveTrendsSection.js, CollectiveTrajectorySection.js (not related to this feature)

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Component correctly implements visibility logic - returns null when followedCount < 2
GOOD: Proper data-testid attributes (recommendation-follow-through-section, follow-through-chart, insight-*)
GOOD: RTL Hebrew layout properly set with dir='rtl' on section element
GOOD: Analytics calculation (calculateAnalytics) properly filters decisions with followed_recommendation === true
GOOD: Alignment rate calculation compares recommendation_direction to value_tag correctly
GOOD: Hebrew insights generated with proper contextual messages based on data patterns
GOOD: SVG chart properly renders direction distribution with dynamic bar widths
GOOD: Pattern analysis shows strongest/weakest patterns with correct styling
seed_data_creation: Created test decisions via UI to trigger analytics section: regular decisions + followed recommendations using 'פעל לפי ההמלצה' button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recommendation Follow-Through Analytics section (RecommendationFollowThroughSection.js) requires at least 2 decisions with followed_recommendation=true to render. The flow is: 1) Create decisions using ActionEvaluationSection, 2) Click 'פעל לפי ההמלצה' in NextBestDirectionSection to follow a recommendation, 3) Evaluate the prefilled action. Section calculates: follow_rate = followed/total, alignment_rate = recommendations where recommendation_direction matches value_tag. RTL Hebrew UI maintained.

feature_tests.test: Section hidden on fresh page (no history)
Distribution chart label (התפלגות מעקב לפי כיוון)

key_metrics.alignment_rate: Shows percentage with color coding (green >50%, amber <=50%)

svg_chart.shows: Distribution bars by direction with alignment percentage

pattern_analysis.strongest: הכי אפקטיבי - shows most effective direction
pattern_analysis.weakest: דורש שיפור - shows direction needing improvement (when < 50%)
